title: lantana larranagae
intro: Lantana larranagae is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family, known for its clusters of small, fragrant flowers and its ability to attract pollinators. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Lantana larranagae is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
